releaseNotes:
Final PSA slab image extraction fix.
- Added rendered PSA cert-page image extraction for lazy-loaded slab images
- Waits briefly for the slab viewer after DOM ready, then caches the front slab image
- Avoids redundant PSA page reloads and long blocking image waits
- PSA API metadata and pricing remain unchanged
- TAG, CGC, sync, updater, and shared credentials unchanged
